014 *  limitations under the License.
015 */
016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
019import jakarta.persistence.Column;
020import jakarta.persistence.Entity;
021import jakarta.persistence.FetchType;
022import jakarta.persistence.GeneratedValue;
023import jakarta.persistence.GenerationType;
024import jakarta.persistence.Id;
025import jakarta.persistence.Index;
026import jakarta.persistence.OneToMany;
027import jakarta.persistence.OrderBy;
028import jakarta.persistence.PrePersist;
029import jakarta.persistence.Table;
030import jakarta.persistence.UniqueConstraint;
031import java.net.URL;
032import java.time.Instant;
033import java.util.LinkedList;
034import java.util.List;
035import java.util.UUID;
036import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;
037
038/**
039 * JPA entity representing a user profile backed by an OAuth subject key.
040 */
041@Entity
042@Table(
043  name = "user_profile",
044  uniqueConstraints = {
045    @UniqueConstraint(name = "uk_user_profile_oauth_key", columnNames = "oauth_key")
046  },
047  indexes = {
048    @Index(name = "ix_user_profile_email", columnList = "email"),
049    @Index(name = "ix_user_profile_user_enabled", columnList = "user_enabled")
050  }
051)
052public class UserProfile {
053
054  @Id
055  @Column(name = "user_profile_id", updatable = false)
056  @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
057  @JsonIgnore
058  private Long id;
059
060  @Column(name = "user_profile_external_id", updatable = false)
061  private UUID externalId;
062
063  @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
064  @JsonIgnore
065  private String oauthKey;
066
067  @Column(nullable = false)
068  private String displayName;
069
070  @Column(nullable = false)
071  private String email;
072
073  @Column(nullable = true, updatable = true)
074  private URL avatar;
075
076  @Column(nullable = false)
077  private boolean isManager;
078
079  @CreationTimestamp
080  @Column(
081    nullable = false,
082    updatable = false
083  )
084  private Instant timeCreated;
085
086  @Column(nullable = false)
087  private boolean userEnabled;
088
089  // used AI to help with OneToMany annotation
090  @OneToMany(mappedBy = "userProfile", fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
091  @OrderBy("timeLastModified DESC")
092  @JsonIgnore
093  private final List<IssueReport> issueReports = new LinkedList<>();
094
095  /**
096   * Returns the database identifier for this user profile.
097   *
098   * @return primary key value.
099   */
100  public Long getId() {
101    return id;
102  }
103
104  /**
105   * Returns the external identifier for this user profile.
106   *
107   * @return external ID.
108   */
109  public UUID getExternalId() {
110    return externalId;
111  }
112
113  /**
114   * Returns the OAuth subject key for this user.
115   *
116   * @return OAuth key.
117   */
118  public String getOauthKey() {
119    return oauthKey;
120  }
121
122  /**
123   * Sets the OAuth subject key for this user.
124   *
125   * @param oauthKey OAuth key.
126   */
127  public void setOauthKey(String oauthKey) {
128    this.oauthKey = oauthKey;
129  }
130
131  /**
132   * Returns the display name for this user.
133   *
134   * @return display name.
135   */
136  public String getDisplayName() {
137    return displayName;
138  }
139
140  /**
141   * Sets the display name for this user profile.
142   *
143   * @param displayName Display name.
144   */
145  public void setDisplayName(String displayName) {
146    this.displayName = displayName;
147  }
148
149  /**
150   * Returns the avatar URL, if configured.
151   *
152   * @return avatar URL.
153   */
154  public URL getAvatar() {
155    return avatar;
156  }
157
158  /**
159   * Sets the avatar URL.
160   *
161   * @param avatar avatar URL.
162   */
163  public void setAvatar(URL avatar) {
164    this.avatar = avatar;
165  }
166
167  /**
168   * Returns the email address.
169   *
170   * @return email address.
171   */
172  public String getEmail() {
173    return email;
174  }
175
176  /**
177   * Sets the email address.
178   *
179   * @param email email address.
180   */
181  public void setEmail(String email) {
182    this.email = email;
183  }
184
185  /**
186   * Returns whether this user has manager privileges.
187   *
188   * @return {@code true} if manager; {@code false} otherwise.
189   */
190  public boolean isManager() {
191    return isManager;
192  }
193
194  /**
195   * Sets whether this user has manager privileges.
196   *
197   * @param isManager {@code true} if manager; {@code false} otherwise.
198   */
199  public void setIsManager(boolean isManager) {
200    this.isManager = isManager;
201  }
202
203  /**
204   * Returns the time this user profile was created.
205   *
206   * @return creation timestamp.
207   */
208  public Instant getTimeCreated() {
209    return timeCreated;
210  }
211
212  /**
213   * Returns whether the user account is enabled.
214   *
215   * @return {@code true} if enabled; {@code false} otherwise.
216   */
217  public boolean getUserEnabled() {
218    return userEnabled;
219  }
220
221  /**
222   * Sets whether the user account is enabled.
223   *
224   * @param userEnabled {@code true} to enable; {@code false} to disable.
225   */
226  public void setUserEnabled(boolean userEnabled) {
227    this.userEnabled = userEnabled;
228  }
229
230  /**
231   * Returns the issue reports created by this user.
232   *
233   * @return issue reports.
234   */
235  public List<IssueReport> getIssueReports() {
236    return issueReports;
237  }
238
239  @PrePersist
240  void onCreate() {
241    this.externalId = UUID.randomUUID();
242  }
243}
